audit_items.proof_trace: The copy_within operation at line 483 correctly implements the shift: it copies old_lookahead[SLOTS_PER_EPOCH..] to lookahead[0..last_epoch_start], where last_epoch_start = proposer_lookahead_slots() - SLOTS_PER_EPOCH. Lines 493-498 then append new proposers to the last epoch range, exactly as the property requires.
